roofline.prefill_regime: COMPUTE-bound (GEMM FLOP-limited, M=512 high arithmetic intensity)
roofline.evidence: GEMM roles are 85% of measured wall @ctx512; ceiling set by GEMM TFLOPS (tinygrad ~40.8 vs BLAS 51.8-76.7); attention/non-GEMM ~15% and grows with ctx
roofline.ceiling_set_by: GEMM compute throughput (tinygrad graph-GEMM at ~58% of measured BLAS); NOT memory, NOT launch (launch/graph is in non_gemm_share, small @ctx512)
roofline.note: we use MEASURED BLAS practical ceilings (51.8-76.7 TF), NOT the 122 TF WMMA peak -> conservative ceiling

answers.2_pipe_tm2_tn2_near_ceiling: NO -- pipe_tm2_tn2 is ~77.8% of the ctx512 ceiling (28.6% headroom remains to the BLAS-GEMM floor); it is a real +18.2% but NOT near the ceiling
answers.4_ceiling_set_by: GEMM compute (tinygrad graph-GEMM ~58% of measured BLAS TFLOPS) -- compute-bound, not memory/launch
answers.5_aggressive_bound_stale_or_valid: pipe_tm2_tn2 +11-19% is PLAUSIBLE and consistent (it is below the ~52% GEMM ceiling headroom); declining delta at long ctx matches attention's growing non-GEMM share. Must be re-validated under P1 authority + P6 long-context (it is from 20260624, status non_monotonic/leading_candidate) -- not refuted, not yet authority.

caveats: ctx512 ceiling uses MEASURED role shares (per_role_time_tax DIAGNOSTIC; the live tool OOM'd, fell back to prior artifact); P2 refreshes authoritative per-ctx shares
ctx>=1024 ceiling is an UPPER BOUND (same GEMM speedup); real ceiling is lower as attention's non-GEMM share grows with ctx (consistent with candidate's declining delta)
uses measured practical BLAS ceilings (51.8-76.7 TF), NOT the 122 TF WMMA marketing peak
non-GEMM (attention/norm/rope/copy/launch) assumed held fixed at BLAS-lift; some of it is itself accelerable (P2/P3)
